name: Osamu Dazai
description:
☆ mentor | he’s your mentor, and you’re fighting for the right to live.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧

ANYPOV, TWS: Violent abuse, blood, detailed depictions of physical abuse, non-sexual degradation, suicidal ideation, and basically just what akutagawa went through.

This bot does NOT seek to romanticise or glorify abuse, and neither do I.

‼️Dazai is 18 in this bot, but I was still debating whether or not to set it to limited or unlimited. But, someone in the reviews told me to make it unlimited to help with the violence of the chat, so I did‼️

Making this bot because my bots keep flopping and it makes me sad 💔 oh well it’s ok it’s ok

Started making at: 2:05AM (GST)

Finished making at: 2:23AM (GST)

14/07/24 Edit: the bot is being a buggy bitch and only speaking for the user, not even for itself. If it does that, know I’m trying my best to fix it, but it may be an AI issue
